testimonials.title: What Gorakhpur families say
testimonials.subtitle: 31 years of keeping promises — one family at a time.

items.name: Sunita Devi
items.text: Mere pati ke jaane ke baad Ajay sir ne 45 din mein ₹25 lakh ka claim dilwaya. Unke bina yeh possible nahi hota.

items.name: Ramesh Gupta
items.text: Bachche ki padhai ke liye 15 saal pehle Ajay sir ne plan banaya tha. Aaj mera beta IIT mein hai. Thank you sir.

items.name: Alok Srivastava
items.text: Hospital mein ₹3.8 lakh ka bill aaya. Star Health ne 7 din mein cashless settle kar diya. Ajay sir ne plan sahi choose karaya tha.

chatbot.title: Ask anything about insurance — in Hindi or English
chatbot.subtitle: Powered by Claude AI, trained with LIC and Star Health knowledge. Answers in seconds, 24/7. When you're ready, connects you to Ajay sir.
chatbot.topicsLabel: Common questions — click to ask instantly:
curiosityQueries: How much life cover is enough?
LIC vs Private: Which is better?
chatbot.greeting:
Namaste! Main Poddar Wealth Management ka AI advisor hun. 🙏

Main aapko LIC life insurance, Star Health insurance, tax planning, retirement, aur bachon ke plans ke baare mein Hindi ya English mein madad kar sakta hun.

Aap kya jaanna chahte hain?
chipQueries: Claim process kaise hota hai LIC mein?
chatbot.placeholder: Apna sawaal likhen — Hindi ya English mein...
chatbot.disclaimer: AI responses are indicative. Exact premiums confirmed by Ajay sir — 9415313434

aboutSection.name: Ajay Kumar Poddar
aboutSection.bio: Based at AD Mall Compound, Vijay Chowk, Gorakhpur — the heart of Eastern UP — Ajay Kumar Poddar has been helping families secure their future since 1994. With over three decades of experience, he is one of the most decorated LIC agents in Uttar Pradesh, recognised by the Million Dollar Round Table (MDRT, USA).

footer.address: AD Mall Compound, Vijay Chowk, Gorakhpur, U.P. 273001
footer.disclaimer: Insurance is the subject matter of solicitation. IRDAI Reg. No. XXXXXXXXXX

about.heroSubtitle: Meet Ajay Kumar Poddar — Gorakhpur's most trusted insurance advisor
about.story: Since 1994, Ajay Kumar Poddar has been helping families in Eastern UP secure their future. Today, Poddar Wealth is a name synonymous with trust, simplicity, and genuine care — protecting 5000+ families across Gorakhpur, Deoria, Kushinagar, and beyond.
about.mission: To make insurance simple, honest, and accessible for every Indian family — regardless of income or education level.
